Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Passed enforced test review-ldiskfs-dne on CentOS 7.0/x86_64 uploaded by Trevis Autotest2 from trevis-38vm5: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/acf57544-8deb-4f98-935a-fb441195f96c ran 4 tests.

Patch Set 1:

(3 comments)

Which distro still ships bash-completion v1.3?

There are quite a few changes between v1 and v2 (https://github.com/scop/bash-completion/compare/1.x...2.x). Trying to support both might prove to be a challenge.

Patch Set 1:

(3 comments)

> Which distro still ships bash-completion v1.3?

I didn't claim it was a new distro...  But it is useful to have the same script to be usable in the older release if possible.

> There are quite a few changes between v1 and v2.
> Trying to support both might prove to be a challenge.

Sure, and I will fix any issues as the need arises and if it isn't too complex.  In this case, I think it is fairly easy to do.  It) appears we could just use _get_comp_words_by_ref() directly (which works for 2.x as well, but I wasn't sure what functionality would be missing so I took the slightly more complex route).
Uploaded patch set 2.

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 2:

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

> but I wasn't sure what functionality would be missing

From what I can read on v2.9, _init_completion() completes variable names, filenames after redirections (and hides redirections when they are not the part of the line that is being completed), and it can split long options too, but that last one we don't use (it is an option: '-s').

So, nothing too important, but I guess it is nice to keep calling _init_completion() when it is defined.

parents.subject: LU-12932 tests: remove obsolete qos.sh test script

commit.subject: LU-12734 misc: allow older bash_completion versions
commit.message:
LU-12734 misc: allow older bash_completion versions

Allow the "lctl" bash_completion to work on older versions which
which don't have _init_completions().  Check at runtime if this
function is available, and if not fall back to an older interface.

Has been manually tested with both bash-completion v1.3 and v2.1.

Fixes: f87a7f2656ce ("LU-12734 misc: add bash completion for lctl set/get_param)"
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I3822c0967354d83d12f299c4be3023b2fc254035
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/36459
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Quentin Bouget <quentin.bouget@cea.fr>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Nathaniel Clark <nclark@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Dominique Martinet <dominique.martinet@cea.fr>
